description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull Request Labeler that triggers on pull_request_target and pull_request_review events. The workflow should have read access to repository contents and write access to pull requests. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that applies labels based on conditions: when a new pull request is opened or reopened, on any pull request, when a pull request is approved, and when a pull request is merged. Each step uses the actions/labeler@v5.0.0 with a specific configuration path and GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets.
